title: The Seven Deadly Sins
overview: The third princess of the Kingdom of Liones, Elizabeth, finds Meliodas, who is the owner of the Boar Hat bar and is also one of the Seven Deadly Sins. With her identity revealed, she is pursued by Twigo whom Meliodas easily defeats. The princess joins him on his journey to find the other Deadly Sins in order to defeat the Holy Knights, who have orchestrated a coup d'état and have overthrown the king.

title: The Sword of the Holy Knight
overview: When Gilthunder plants his sword in the center of the town and stops the village from making ale, only Meliodas can remove it, making him town savior.

title: The Sin in the Sleeping Forest
overview: Meliodas, Hawk and Elizabeth travel to the daunting Forest of White Dreams, where Meliodas goes to dangerous extremes to obtain information.

title: A Little Girl's Dream
overview: Diane joins the mission to free Ban from the Baste Dungeon, but the group is assailed by an enemy set on crushing the whole town and the Deadly Sins.

title: Even if You Should Die
overview: Golgius tries to seize the sword from Elizabeth and Meliodas; the sound of a mysterious bell drives the group to fight each other.

title: The Poem of Beginnings
overview: Elizabeth and Meliodas must fight Holy Knights Friesia and Ruin to proceed to the dungeon. An omen foretells of disaster on its way to Britannia.

title: A Touching Reunion
overview: Ban, Meliodas and company have finally reunited. Seeking a clue to the location of the Grizzly's Sin of Sloth, they head to the Capital of the Dead.

title: The Fearsome Pursuer
overview: King and Ban have a final showdown. Holy Knight Guila battles Meliodas, Diane and Elizabeth. Ban remembers Elaine and the Fountain of Youth.

title: Dark Pulse
overview: Elaine finally persuades King to rescue Meliodas and the others. Back in the capital, malcontent starts to stir among some of the Holy Knights.

title: The Vaizel Fighting Festival
overview: Upon learning the fighting festival's grand prize, Gideon; Meliodas, Ban and King decide to participate, as do Holy Knights Howzer and Griamore.

title: Pent-up Feeling
overview: In the final match of the festival's first round, Ban reflects on the first time he met Meliodas. Veronica and Griamore search for Elizabeth.

title: Bloodcurdling Cannon
overview: During the last match of the festival, the venue breaks out in pandemonium when a group of Holy Knights attacks.

title: The Angel of Destruction
overview: Enclosed inside the Goddess Amber, Meliodas breaks free and reappears. Not his true self, he begins attacking his allies as well as his enemies.

title: A Reader of Books
overview: Meliodas and his pals begin a new search for the remaining Seven Deadly Sins. The Holy Knight Helbram dispatches assassins to crush the Armor Giant.

title: Unholy Knight
overview: Just as the attack overtakes the Armor Giant, Gowther appears, taking unexpected action. Elizabeth learns of Meliodas' past and the existence of Liz.

title: The Legends, Provoked
overview: Elizabeth's words convince Meliodas to fight, and it becomes clear who stole his consciousness. Hendrickson begins to resurrect the Demon Clan.

title: The First Sacrifice
overview: When Elizabeth is kidnapped, Meliodas, Ban and Gowther launch an attack on the capital. Meanwhile, King Arthur of Camelot confronts Hendrickson.

title: Even If It Costs Me My Life
overview: Diane has a brush with death while protecting Zeal. Howzer and Guila are forced into a struggle against formidable magical powers.

title: The Fairy King Waits In Vain
overview: The King reminisces over some old memories of a time Diane and King spent together when Diane was still a giant child. Back to the present, King fights Hellbram, while in a different location Hendriksen fights Arthur.

title: The Courage Charm
overview: In order to take Elizabeth back, Meliodas teams up with Arthur to fight a fierce battle against Hendrickson and Gilthunder.

title: The Looming Threat
overview: Ban explores the catacombs under the city. Merlin and the other sins go to the chamber where the king Baltra and Elizabeth are being held captive. Dreyfus has a confession.

title: What I Can Do For You
overview: Ban attempts to kill Meliodas, but is stopped by Hawk. Meliodas and the sins corner Hendriksen and prepare to take him down.

title: Despair Descends
overview: Pursued by the Seven Deadly Sins, Hendrickson makes two finds that give him the ultimate Demon power.

title: Heroes
overview: Just when it seems as if the Seven Deadly Sins will be defeated by Hendrickson's overwhelming power, Elizabeth's power returns to her.

title: Revival of the Demon Clan
overview: As the kingdom begins to rebuild after the coup attempt, the king honors the Seven Deadly Sins for their bravery with a medal ceremony.

title: Existence and Proof
overview: With Fraudrin's manipulation of Hendrickson, the Ten Commandments return to the physical realm. King follows Ban to the Fairy King's Forest.

title: Sacred Treasure Lostvayne
overview: Diane confronts Gowther after he manipulates Guila and Zeal's memories. With the return of the Demon Clan, new threats descend upon allied clans.

title: The Ten Commandments on the Move
overview: King struggles to fend off the giant Albion sent to destroy the Fairy King's Forest. Galand of the Ten Commandments appears before Meliodas.

title: Overwhelming Violence
overview: The fairies reconcile their differences with King as Ban leaves the forest. Meanwhile, Meliodas and gang are overwhelmed by the sheer power of Galand.

title: The Atoning Great Holy Knight
overview: Hendrickson, thought to have been defeated against Meliodas, aids Gilthunder and the Holy Knights against a powerful Gray Demon.

title: Where Memories Lead
overview: An injured Diane awakens, having trouble remembering her comrades. With her memories fading, she heads for Megadozer, home of the Giant Clan.

title: The Druids' Holy Land
overview: Meliodas and others head to Megadozer in hopes of finding Diane. Meanwhile, a confused Diane encounters Galand of the Ten Commandments once again.

title: The Promise with the Loved One
overview: Acknowledging his lack of strength to face the Ten Commandments, Meliodas vigorously trains with the Druids of Istar to regain his sealed powers back.

title: What We Lacked
overview: Ban reflects on his past after returning to his childhood home in Ravens. Meliodas's allies train for their inevitable war with the Ten Commandments.

title: Father and Son
overview: A frail Zhivago reunites with Ban, is long-lost adopted son. Meanwhile, a wary King confronts Meliodas about his true intentions.

title: Where Love is Found
overview: After a brief encounter with Meliodas, the Ten Commandments begin their attack on Britannia. A resurrected Elaine appears before Ban.

title: Farewell, My Beloved Thief
overview: A revived but possessed Elaine attacks her lover, Ban, as Melascula and Galand of the Ten Commandments emerge to destroy those in their path.

title: The Master of the Sun
overview: Jericho carries severely injured Ban and Elaine on her back while escaping from Galand and Melascula before stumbling into a bar deep inside a cave.

title: A Bloodcurdling Confession
overview: Gloxinia and Drole of the Ten Commandments lure strong fighters to Vaizel by offering to grant any wish to the winner of their Great Fight Festival.

title: Death-Trap Maze
overview: An elaborate trap-laded deadly maze constructed by Drole begins to weed out the weaker challengers that have gathered for the Great Fight Festival.

title: Legendary Figures
overview: The surviving challengers of the Great Fight Festival are split into pairs and made to face each other in a tag team battle.

title: For Whom Does That Light Shine?
overview: King and Diane continue their battle against opponents summoned by Gloxinia and Drole. Escanor refuses to fight against his fellow ally Gowther.

title: Meliodas vs The Ten Commandments
overview: As Escanor's battle with Gowther comes to a dramatic end, Meliodas must now face the remaining Ten Commandments in an all-out battle.

title: Pursuit of Hope
overview: With Meliodas rendered powerless, Ban asks to be transported back so he can aid him in his fight against Estarossa and the other Ten Commandments.

title: Certain Warmth
overview: While caring for Meliodas, Elizabeth encounters a former Great Holy Knight thought to have perished long ago by the hands of Dreyfus and Hendrickson.

title: Return of the Sins
overview: With Ban and the Holy Knights paralyzed by Estarossa’s powers, Escanor shows up to thwart the fall of Liones at the hands of the Ten Commandments.

title: The Hero Rises!
overview: As the situation inside Liones Castle becomes even more dire, Merlin, freed from Galand's Commandment of Truth, reappears in her former form.

title: As Long As You Are Here
overview: Determined to kill his former leader for betraying their clan three thousand years ago, Fraudrin takes on a newly resurrected darker, more powerful Meliodas.

title: The Light That Drives Off Darkness
overview: The demons are collecting human souls, whilst Estarossa is recovering from the battle with Escanor. Pelio discovers that humans are being given to the demons, who are defeated by Meliodas. The King chooses the next Great Holy Knight.

title: Memories of the Holy War
overview: King and Diane take refuge in the Fairy King's Forest to escape the Ten Commandments. But Gloxinia and Drole find them after a peaceful interlude.

title: Let There Be Light
overview: Looking like Gloxinia and Drole, King and Diane are transported back to Britannia 3,000 years ago. There they meet Meliodas, who's fighting for Stigma.

title: The Ten Commandments vs. The Four Archangels
overview: Enraged by the events demons attack but Seriel and Tarmiel shows up and wipes out a large number of them in an instant. But as Ludociel joins the battle they are overpowered.Gowther and Melascula enters the stigma headquarters and takes over Nerobasta.

title: Emotional Maelstrom
overview: As Elizabeth succeeds in pushing back the indura form Gowther and Melascula are upto something in stigma headquarters, amidst of that Round and other humans attacks and kills everyone in stigma. As the gates open a person appears and gowther starts behaving differently.

title: We Call That Love
overview: Diane learns of the back-story of Gowther and makes a promise. King faces his final test in the realm and must make a crucial choice that Gloxinia faced 3000 years ago.

title: Deadly Sins Unite!
overview: Diane in the form of Drone goes against Zeldris the executioner but soon she realises his magnitude of power. After passing the test Diane and King unite with the rest of the sins.

title: The Doll Seeks Love
overview: Gowther's past memories resurface as he is reminded by the magical heart given to him by his master. Desperate to forget them, Gowther flees and tries to erase his memories, but The Seven Deadly Sins won't make it easy for him to do so.

title: The Cursed Lovers
overview: Merlin starts looking for Arthur but is trapped by Zeldris. Sins celebrate to their reunion but Elizabeth seems to be worried when Diane tells her about goddess Elizabeth. Merlin's condition is worsened but Elizabeth cures her and in that brief time she meets Zeldris who tells her something which in turn makes Meliodas extremely worried.

title: That Is Our Way of Life
overview: Sins come to know about the tragic lives of Meliodas and Elizabeth. They decide to go to the walled city of Coland where none other than Zeldris shows up...

title: The Hateful Cannot Rest
overview: The party heads to the city of Coland to dispel the distortion protecting Camelot. When Meliodas is trapped in darkness, they must fight without him.

title: Love is a Maiden's Power
overview: Trapped in Melascula's magic, Meliodas breaks the magic at the cost of his emotions. Out of cocoon comes a very different Meliodas who will be confronted by the mightiest of the sin.

title: The Almighty vs. the Greatest Evil
overview: As things have escalated quickly this will be the final showdown among the strongest to prove who is better WRATH or PRIDE...

title: A New Threat
overview: Meliodas still unconscious after the fight with Escanor, while Chandler proceeds to claim back his old student.

title: To Our Captain
overview: Chandler, Meliodas' former mentor, aids Zeldris. He infiltrates the Boar Hat to capture Meliodas, but the Deadly Sins stand in his way.

title: The Seven Deadly Sins End
overview: King prepares to face Chandler, who's returned in his demonic form. Gloxinia and Drole appear, risking their lives so the Deadly Sins can escape.

title: Our Choices
overview: Meliodas disbands the Deadly Sins and departs with Elizabeth. But his companions aren't going to let him go without a fight, and Hawk holds the key.

title: March of the Saints
overview: Merlin faces Zeldris, whom Meliodas has ordered to gather the Commandments. Margaret, Hendrickson and Dreyfus continue their search for Gilthunder.

title: The Holy War Accord
overview: Having taken over Margaret's body, Ludociel appears in Liones and declares a holy war against the Demon Clan. Chandler searches for Elizabeth.

title: Child of Hope
overview: In Camelot, Arthur searches for the Holy Sword Excalibur alone. Ludociel warns Escanor to give up his Grace of Sunshine, on pain of death.

title: Beginning of the Holy War
overview: Inside Camelot, Arthur makes his last stand against Meliodas and the others. Merlin comes to his rescue, but not before he falls under Cusack's spell.

title: War-torn Britannia
overview: The new Holy War commences as the allied forces of Stigma face off against the Demon Clan. Derieri decides to surrender her Commandment to Zeldris.

title: The One Twisted by Darkness
overview: Sensing Elizabeth's magic, Derieri appears before the Stigma army. Estarossa follows her, but Sariel and Tarmiel have other plans for him.

title: Rampaging Love
overview: Estarossa professes his love for Elizabeth. When he loses control after absorbing three of the Commandments, Stigma's army faces him in a final battle.

title: From Purgatory
overview: Ban searches purgatory for Meliodas. King, Deriri and the others head to Heaven's Theater to rescue Elizabeth, who's been abducted by Estarossa.

title: A Meeting with the Unknown
overview: Reunited once again, Ban and Meliodas prepare to face the Demon King, who they suspect holds the key to their escape from purgatory.

title: A Single-Minded Love
overview: With Wild now an ally, Meliodas brings Zeldris' tragic past to light as the newly formed trio make their way towards the Demon King.

title: The Victims of the Holy War
overview: Meliodas grapples with suddenly losing his memories of Estarossa. Zeldris, Chandler and Cusack threaten to overpower Merlin and the others.

title: The Tragic Strike
overview: Gowther reveals that his creator, the real Gowther, cast a forbidden spell on Mael and all those who knew him to end the Holy War 3,000 years ago.

title: Confront Despair!!
overview: Gowther takes on Mael to protect his friends. Diane also joins the battle, but the Archangel's power level continues to rise as he nears his final form.

title: Hope, Conflict, and Despair
overview: Mael changes form after absorbing four of the Commandments. King soon overwhelms him with his Spirit Spear, but Gowther tries to save the Archangel.

title: The Doorway to Hope
overview: Meliodas and the others have to defeat the Demon King before they can escape Purgatory and make their way to the world of the living.

title: That Which Gathers
overview: Chandler and Cusack merge to form the all-powerful Original Demon. Merlin gives up any hope of victory, but Mael and King soon come to her aid.

title: The Salvation of the Sun
overview: As Meliodas absorbs every last one of the Ten Commandments, Merlin attempts a forbidden spell to stop the birth of a new Demon King.

title: The One Who Stands Against a God
overview: Merlin's spell thwarts Meliodas' transformation. The Holy War seems to be over, but Elizabeth senses something is still terribly wrong.

title: We'll All Be Your Strength
overview: Escaping purgatory, Ban faces the Demon King, who now possesses Meliodas’ body. Elizabeth and the others make their way into the spirit world.

title: The End of a Long Journey
overview: Peace returns to the Kingdom of Liones. Although Elizabeth is still under a curse, Meliodas assures her there is a way to break it.

title: Farewell, Seven Deadly Sins
overview: Now that Meliodas is the Demon King, he cannot remain on earth. Though his friends acknowledge his fate, they are unable to accept it.

title: Fated Brothers
overview: Merlin rescues Elizabeth, who barely evades a falling boulder on her way to the Demon Realm with Meliodas. The Sins realise the Demon King is alive.

title: The Final Battle
overview: Elizabeth and Meliodas face the Demon King, who now possesses the body of Zeldris. Meanwhile, the Sins clash with a beast summoned by the Demon King.

title: The Voice Calling Your Name
overview: With Escanor's aid, Meliodas and Gowther reach the spirit world, where they aim to split the Demon King and Zeldris back into their own bodies.

title: The King Sings Alone
overview: Diane destroys the source of the Demon King's magic. Meanwhile, Escanor continues fighting the Demon King at full power, exceeding his limits.

title: The Struggle
overview: Escanor converts all of his life energy into magic to defeat the Demon King. Meliodas pleads with his comrade to stop, but Escanor refuses to listen.

title: Mortal Enemies
overview: Zeldris and the Sins corner the Demon King in both realms, but the King separates from his son's body and possesses Britannia itself as his new vessel.

title: What the Witch Had Always Wanted
overview: The long-fought Holy War comes to a dramatic end. Peace returns to the Kingdom of Britannia once again, but a new threat looms on the horizon.

title: A Taste of Chaos
overview: The Sins are shocked by Merlin's longtime deception. Meanwhile, Merlin declares that Arthur has been recognized as the King of Chaos.

title: An Everlasting Kingdom
overview: A vicious beast in his true form, Cath attacks the reawakened Arthur. Now separated from the Sins, Merlin attempts to take on the monster herself.

title: Heirs
overview: Arthur's battle with Cath comes to an epic conclusion. The Seven Deadly Sins go their separate ways as peace returns to the world once again.
